## Title 42
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Fin. Responsibility Law
##### § 42-7-420 — Failure of proof

Whenever any evidence of proof of ability to respond in damages filed by any person under the provisions of this article no longer fulfills the purpose for which required, the director, for the purpose of this article, shall require other evidence of ability to respond in damages as required by this article and shall suspend the license of such person pending such proof.
